intro:
This time, the stage is Thailand!
Test your ability to read the room in familiar, everyday Thai scenarios!
description:
The character “You” from KUUKIYOMI travels from Japan to Thailand. 
By spending time together with friends met in Thailand, those friends gradually begin to learn what it means to "Consider It". 
Through the unique situations they encounter, how will these Thai friends choose to "Consider It"?

■ Game Features
KUUKIYOMI: Consider It World – Thailand Ver. is an ambitious title that lets you experience "Consider It"! through Thailand’s unique culture, values, and communication styles.
This is a completely original work created by Thai creators, and all 100 problems included in the game are newly made specifically for this title.
As you play, you will consider things such as the atmosphere of the situation, other people’s feelings, and small acts of thoughtfulness  while experiencing various situations in Thailand.

■ How to Play
The way to play this game is very simple.
The basic rule is that you can move the red object on the screen.
Most of the time, you will control the protagonist known as “You,” but depending on the situation, you may control something else.By playing all 100 problems, the game will evaluate how well you were able to "Consider It".

■ Results
The familiar evaluation of whether you were able to Consider It returns in this title,this time expressed in a Thai style, inspired by Thai food and the ghosts and occult that Thai people enjoy.
After playing all 100 problems, your overall ability to Consider It will be evaluated.
※ The results change each time, depending on how you play.

■ Game Modes
・ Consider It Mode
A total of 100 problems will be presented.
After playing all problems, your ability to "Consider It" will be evaluated.

・ Chapter Mode
After clearing the game, you will be able to play each problem individually.
※ No evaluation results are shown in Chapter Mode.

・ Secrets
This game includes secret elements (titles).
Whether or not these secrets are revealed depends on how you play.

・ Past You
You can view the evaluation results from your past playthroughs.
